---
title: "Guozheng Huang"
#subtitle: "Residualsun"
image: "img/avatar.jpg"
image-alt: "Residualsun"
back-to-top-navigation: false

listing: 
- id: blog
  contents: 
    - "../blog/*/**/index.qmd"
  sort: date desc
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 1
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, subtitle, image]
  max-items: 1
  image-height: "200"
- id: reading
  contents: 
    - "../lifestream/*/**/index.qmd"
  sort: date desc
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 1
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, image]
  max-items: 1
  image-height: "200"
- id: english-writing
  contents: 
    - "../literatures/*/**/index.qmd"
  sort: date desc
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 1
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, subtitle, image]
  max-items: 1
  image-height: "200"
- id: r
  contents: 
    - "../r/*/**/index.qmd"
    - "../r/*/**/index.markdown"
  sort: date desc
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 1
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, image]
  max-items: 1
  image-height: "200"

about:
  template: solana
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 15em
  id: hero-heading
page-layout: full
toc: false
sidebar: false

execute: 
  freeze: false
  echo: false
  warning: false
  
comments: false
---

## About me

Hello, I am Guozheng Huang, an ordinary junior student who likes to listen to Jay Chou and MY LITTLE AIRPORT when I am idle, Linkin Park when I am depressed, and Leslie Cheung when I am nostalgic.

Recently, I've been listening to my little airport, and *It's Raining for Two Days* always reminds me of a passage written by Liu Yisheng:

> "Rusty feelings again on a rainy day, thoughts playing hide-and-seek in smoke rings."

*Tears of SABINA*, *Summer Vacation Back to Middle School*, *Sad Whoremonger*, *The Year of Walking*, *Every Time You Go*, *For Telling It Like It Is*, and *Then the Formation Didn't Know It* are all very good, and are in my favorite style; in the words of Lechi, they all seem to be woozy.

::: {.panel-tabset align="left"}
## Interests

-   Writing
-   Reading
-   Talking

## Education

<!---   **Ph.D.** \| Educational Measurement & Statistics \| [2019 - 2022]{style="color:darkgrey;"}
-   **M.S.** \| Educational Psychology \| [2015 - 2019]{style="color:darkgrey;"}-->
-   **B.S.** \| Sociology \| [2021 - 2025]{#date style="color:darkgrey;"}

## Experience
<!--
-   **Postdoctoral Fellow**

    The Chinese University of Hong Kong

    [Dec 2022 - June 2023]{style="color:darkgrey;"}

-   **Associate Researcher**

    Stanford Research Institute (SRI)

    [June 2021 - Jan 2022]{style="color:darkgrey;"}
-->
:::

## 

<!-- end grid -->

## Lately……

::: grid

::: {#lately .g-col-3}
#### Blog

::: {#blog}
:::

[All →](../blog){.about-links .subtitle}
:::

::: {#lately .g-col-3}
#### Lifestream

::: {#lifestream}
:::

[All →](../lifestream){.about-links .subtitle}
:::

::: {#lately .g-col-3}
#### Literatures

::: {#literatures}
:::

[All →](../literatures){.about-links .subtitle}
:::

::: {#lately .g-col-3}
#### R

::: {#r}
:::

[All →](../r){.about-links .subtitle}
:::
:::
